# Pre-merge review

Review the pending change set against the repository strategy.

Check:
- requirement assumptions are explicit
- docs are synchronized
- tests are synchronized
- architecture views and diagrams are updated when needed
- branch and commit naming are appropriate
- risky areas and unvalidated areas are clearly listed
- obsolete tests, fixtures, or docs are not left behind

Return:
- blocking issues
- non-blocking improvements
- missing docs/tests/diagrams
- suggested commit message
